summary: Seemingly against Tolkki's wishes, Jari Kainulainen was fired in 2005 following the release of the album for reasons Tolkki said were "so absurd that I am not even going to try and explain them here"
key_points: Seemingly against Tolkki's wishes, Jari Kainulainen was fired in 2005 following the release of the album for reasons Tolkki said were "so absurd that I am not even going to try and explain them here"
title: Insight from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Random
